title: Re-Classic ULTRA
description: Nostalgic modpack with old mechanics (like food healing healtbar), items and more!
body:
# PUBLIC TEST 0.7.4 IS HERE!

**Nostalgic-look modpack with something cool ideas. A lot of old content, like old interface, old mechanics and more.**


![Bedrock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a35c10381bfe1c516ebc1df6d8c3224ccbb2957a.jpeg)

Experience the super cool-looking mod pack with 99% nostalgia immersion! In this modpack you will plunge into the old versions, but with the preservation of new mechanics, biomes and much more!



One thing remains... Strange bugs, I hope I can fix them and they won't interfere much with the game. Sometimes strange things happen in the game... 



If you are blocked from your personal world, delete the 'entities' folder.


<details>
<summary>...</summary>

Don't look behind

</details>
